title: Omnissiah
aspect: Divine intellect and the totality of knowledge
dogma: The Omnissiah knows all — seek understanding and you approach the divine
worship: Mastery of technology, acquisition of knowledge, ritual maintenance
lore: The Omnissiah is the supreme deity of the Cult Mechanicus — the divine embodiment of knowledge, logic, and the machine. Mechanicus theology holds that the Omnissiah is the aspect of the Emperor that walked among humanity during the Dark Age of Technology, seeding civilisation with sacred science.

Most Imperial scholars believe the Omnissiah is simply another name for the Emperor of Mankind. The Mechanicus itself has never formally confirmed this equivalence, preferring to maintain theological autonomy.

Worship of the Omnissiah takes the form of technical mastery — every blueprint recovered, every machine maintained, and every new discovery is an act of devotion. The Omnissiah does not demand prayer in words but in perfect mechanism.
